LanguageData.TraitDef.Eternal_GeneticMarker.label: Eternal
LanguageData.TraitDef.Eternal_GeneticMarker.descripti: This pawn possesses the Eternal genetic marker, enabling true biological immortality through precise regrowth.
LanguageData.TraitDef.Eternal_GeneticMarker.degreeDat: This pawn is an Eternal, capable of regenerating from any injury through a precise biological sequence.
